name: Trigga Troy's Premiere: A Director's Tribute to His Lead Actor Friend

chat_messages.text: I have a premiere coming up on the 24th its for my short film I wrote, directed, shot, and edited. Consider the following facts: I developed the story around my good friend Tre, he plays the main character Trigga Troy. I met Tre during covid19, 2021. I moved away for a while, and then moved back to los angeles we reconected, and he told me, he wanted to play the role of an evil character, and I developed out the story with that in mind. I am a passionate film maker, I am extremely creative, and apparently a good director for this being my first film. A lot of talented people helped and acted during the shoot, and in the middle of the day, it was a hot summer day. It was an amazing effort by the crew and cast. Claude, please write me a speech to give at the "Trigga Troy" Premiere, enough for a 30 second to a 60 second speech. Make sure to thank the hard work of the whole cast, give a special shout out to tre my good friend who made it possible and supported me creatively, make it light hearted. You are free to reference the script I am attaching.

attachments.extracted_content:
1.
EXT. PARKING LOT - DAY1 1
The Car Trunk Opens TROY and his driver DONNY are having a
casual conversation. TROY a preacher's son turned crime
lord. All charisma and smiles until crossed, infamously
nicknamed "Trigga Troy" for a reason.
DONNY a man born to drive. Man of little words, oral
fixations, and a gambling addiction.
TROY
Honestly, where is this mothafucka?
I might have to smoke him as soon
as he gets here for having me wait.
Donny nods, sucking on a tootsie roll pop.
Donny Hands TROY a HANDGUN. Donny closes the trunk.
REMOTE HILL - DAY2 2
Troy and Donny Walk down a path.
TROY
It's like, if I tell you to be
somewhere and you say cool just be
there. why is that so hard. 45
minutes? I signed this boy for 5
million. His ass better be on time.
You know who was 45 minutes late?
fucking Judas. I am a loving
patient god fearing man. But I will
kill this fool. 5 million. His ass
better be shitting platinum, at the
very least show up on time.
They reach the end of the path arrive on a hill overlooking
city, ahead of them on the hill two women standing over a
hooded victim on his knees.
The Two Women are:
IZZY professional ass kicker. Calm, cool, collected, but
deadly.
VANESSA naturally sadistic with a very dark sense of humor.
That huge lively grin born from a good night of torturing.
TROY

2.
Izzy! Vanessa! How's our boy doin'?
VANESSA with a huge grin is petting the hooded man
VANESSA
Tired, he didn't get much sleep
last night...
The Kneeling man answers with an anxious and fearful
mumble. Izzy and Vanessa look at each other and smile.
(CUT TO)
REMOTE HILL (SECONDS LATER)3 3
MATEO Hip hop star energy, ready to perform even when no
body is watching or around.
MATEO strolls over to join the group.
MATEO
(singing) Dis TikTok hoe- gotta go
with my glock not a clock but they
on the clock with my cock. Enny
mini minie hoeee--
MATEO
Hahaaa yea yeah yahhh firre firee-
Siri make a note: TITLE DOPElishes
lyrics idea #287. write DIS TIkTOK
HOE GOTTA G----
Troy cuts Mateo off mid note.
TROY
Matteo, man with the plan! The
vision.
(beat)
heard your new single. Extraordinary.
You gassed that shit!
MATEO
Yeah you already know how I do
boss.
TROY
Please, call me Troy. How's your
brother?

3.
MATEO
Rome? Wish I knew, that nigga ran
off to Vegas with some only fans
bitch.
TROY
Mmmm, I'm sure he'll regret that
when you're on top and everyone
knows your name. While he's stuck
trickin on some only fans hoe that
everyone and they daddy done ran
threw..
Both chuckle.
MATEO
True, True.
TROY smirks
TROY
See Mateo, it's all about loyalty.
If you can't trust or rely on them
now. What gives them the right! To
reap all the benefits with you
later.
MATEO looks with understanding.
TROY
(continued) Now I wanna thank you
for coming on such short notice. My
girls IZZY and Vanessa wanted to
handle this nigga for me.
Vanessa nods mischievously. Vanessa pats her hooded victim
intimately on the head. The Hooded man mumbles loudly
helplessly trying to free himself.
TROY
(continued) But then I thought,
maybe this would be a great
opportunity for some team building.
After all you live your lyrics
don't you?
MATEO
you already know what's up.
TROY

4.
what'd you say in that new song you
just dropped? (singing) no roses on
a brothas grave fucka gotta get
mine while his head roll in a
shallow grave pop pow
MATEO
Yeaaaaah! You like that huh? That's
all real life shit too, you feel
me.
Both smirk slightly.
MATEO
Aye Troy who this weird nigga in
the hood?
TROY
A disloyal associate of mine. I
think you may know him.
VANESSA reaches out for the hood and promptly snatches it
off the victims head revealing MATEO's brother ROME. ROME
winces at the headlights.
There is DUCK TAPE over Romes mouth with the words DISLOYAL
written across.
MATEO
Bbb-boss. Ththats Rome, that's my
brother.
TROY
Call me Troy. Brother? Yes, I know.
You are going to shoot- YOUR
Brother.
MATEO
Troy, I-III don't get it. I thought
we was good.
TROY
(chuckles) You're misguided. I
value one thing Mateo. Loyalty.
Loyalty is consistency, loyalty is
family. Loyalty is knowing when I
go to sleep tonight I'm not going
to get stabbed in the back. Are you
going to stab me in the back?
MATEO
No bos--

5.
TROY gives disapproving glance.
MATEO
No Troy, I swear to God I won't!
Troy carries on pacing between MATEO and ROME.
TROY
Without loyalty you have no one.
You are no one. How do you weed out
disloyalty Mateo?
MATEO
I umm, you...
TROY
How do you weed out disloyalty?
MATEO
You know them for a long time?
TROY
you test for it. Actions speak
louder than words, Mateo. Loyalty
must be demonstrated. You weed out
disloyalty by testing.
(beat)
TROY
Like you said, your brother
abandoned you. He left you, high
and dry. Any disloyalty to you is
disloyalty to me. And don't worry
about that only fans bitch.. Ya
might want to cancel your
membership though.
DRIVER bites down on tootsie roll pop, CRACKKK.
TROY
How many licks was that?
DRIVER
444.
TROY
A lucky number!
TROY looks Mateo dead in the eye, nods playfully almost,
and offers the gun once more.
MATEO

6.
I-I cant. It my brother.
TROY gives a disapproving wince and twists his head as if
painfully. He walks towards the back of MATEO and drapes
his hand over his right shoulder.
TROY is waving the gun carelessly in his left hand; he
brings it to Mateo's head and taps next to his temple as if
he had a good idea.
Troy pushes the gun into Mateo's stomach. Mateo grabs it
with his right hand. Troy grasps Mateo's left hand and
places it on the gun as well.
TROY
You're doing great Mateo.
Troy helps Mateo aim the HANDGUN at his Brother.
TROY
Now for the easy Part.
MATEO
I-I cant..
TROY
I won't tell you again. Shoot him.
MATEO
Aight aight aight. I'll do it.
MATEO refocusses on his brother. They lock eyes, Mateo
looks away and starts to squeeze.
(Beat)
CLICK CLICK. NOTHING.
ROME
(Grunting) f-ttuck ewww
MATEO looks confused and starts to check the gun.
Without a moments hesitation IZZY springs into action
expertly disarming MATEO and laying him on the ground.
Sides steps and curb stomps MATEO in one swift motion.
IZZY walks over to TROY with the HANDGUN and hands it to
him.
TROY

7.
Now, where were we? (beat) Oh yes,
I remember.
TROY Loads a loaded clip into the HANDGUN.
TROY
Disloyalty.
TROY glances and motions at VANESSA. She rips the DUCK TAPE
off ROME. RIPPP.
ROME
Ahh- fuckk! Just like that? fuck
you fam--
Wackkkk! Vanessa delivers a disciplinary blow to Rome.
VANESSA
Bad BOYY!
TROY
Now you might be wondering why I
brought you---
MATEO
I aint have a (painful cough)
choice, and fu-fuck you. Up in left
like a Buhh -bitchh--
Troy cock gun grabbing Mateo attention.
TROY
You really think I wouldn't find
out about a sponsorship deal?!
ROME
He knows.
MATEO
Wh-what? bb-BOSS?
POW! TROY shoots MATEO in the Left shoulder.
MATEO
Gahhhh!!
TROY
I Said call me TROY MOTHA FUCKA!!
Sit him up.
IZZY
(chuckles)I'll try.

8.
IZZY manhandles a broken MATEO nursing his shoulder
propping him up in a semi kneeling position.
TROY
The Milo's Deal.
Loyalty you see it's a funny thing
(leans in closer to Mateo). It
isn't about just trusting someone.
TROY straightens Mateos shirt collar.
ROME
I was coming back I swear. Money
and everything.
TROY
(To Rome) You should have stuck to
producing play boy!
MATEO
Tr-Troy my new single, its cash
money mannn.. Please..
TROY
(continues talking to Mateo) It's
about knowing that they would never
betray you.. FOR Example. A
GAMBLING addiction. Can't have it.
TROY Stands up.
TROY
(to donny) and so Donny I will no
longer be requiring your services.
Troy aims his Handgun at Donny.POW! He shoots Donny dead. a
fresh lolly pop hits the pavement along with Donny lifeless
body.
Shock is in the air.
TROY
The Milo's Deal. You two owe me
$187,000. You have 48 hours. And
you want to fuck off to Vegas for 3
months? Think again. Y'all's ass is
in the studio. We Clear? And when
my legal team reaches out with your
new artist contract...
Troy looks at them both dead in the eye.
TROY

9.
Clear?
MATEO
Gahh We clear.
ROME
Yea yea you got it.
A notification is heard coming from TROY's PHONE. Troy
looks at phone it reads- "Ice cream with son".
TROY
Izzy, call Frank have him take a
look at our star's shoulder?
Vanessa the driver, you got that?
Troy turns and walks away from the group to go about the
rest of his day.
Rome and Mateo look at each other for a beat.
ROME
(to Mateo) Hey Fuck you.

chat_messages.text:
Here is a draft 30-60 second speech for the premiere of your short film "Trigga Troy":

Good evening everyone! I want to thank you all for being here tonight for the premiere of my directorial debut "Trigga Troy." This film would not have been possible without the immense talent and hard work of our incredible cast and crew. You all brought this story to life in the middle of a hot Los Angeles summer day - your passion and dedication to the craft shone through.  

I especially want to thank my good friend Tre, who believed in me as a first time director and fully committed himself to embodying the lead role of Trigga Troy. Tre, your trust in me as a creative partner made this entire journey possible. I'm so grateful for our friendship.

I hope you all enjoy watching "Trigga Troy" as much as I enjoyed making it. This premiere is a dream come true for me. Thank you all for your support, and let's celebrate indie filmmaking!
please make this with more humor

Here's a version with a bit more humor:

Good evening ladies and gentlemen! Welcome to the premiere of my directorial debut "Trigga Troy."  Now I don't want to brag, but this just may be the next Oscar winner for Best Picture. I'm kidding - if it wins any awards, it will definitely be for Best Supporting Sweat Stains because it was hotter than hell on set. 

In all seriousness, I am so thankful for each and every one of the cast and crew who poured their passion into this film. You all made my vision come to life, even as the sun was beating down on us that day. Let's give a round of applause for the talented cast and tireless crew!

And a special shoutout to my friend Tre, who fully committed to playing the ruthless Trigga Troy. Tre, I'm so grateful you trusted me to guide you in your most villainous performance yet. You truly embodied the character, even though I know your charming, fun-loving self is the total opposite!  

I hope you all enjoy the film - we made it with a lot of heart and a little bit of sweat. Let's celebrate indie filmmaking and go grab some drinks after to rehydrate! Cheers everyone!
I want to make a chapter name for this film at the beginning. Using the script pdf attached create a name for a chapter in the movie.

Here is a suggested chapter name for your film "Trigga Troy" based on the script:

Chapter 1: Loyalty & Betrayal

The key themes in the opening of the script revolve around loyalty, betrayal, and testing trust between the main characters Troy and Mateo. Troy gives a monologue about the importance of loyalty and tests Mateo's loyalty by making him confront his own brother. The chapter title "Loyalty & Betrayal" captures these pivotal moments that set the stage for the rest of the story. The juxtaposition highlights Troy's twisted code while foreshadowing Mateo's struggle when his loyalty is tested against his own flesh and blood. This inner conflict will drive the narrative forward, making this an impactful chapter name for the start of the film.
make the chapter name more badass

Here's a more badass version of the chapter name:

Chapter 1: Blood Brothers 

The bond between brothers is supposed to be unbreakable. But Trigga Troy don't play by the rules of family. In the streets, loyalty means more than blood. Mateo about to learn the hard way where his loyalties lie. Troy gonna teach him a lesson about betraying your own - put a bullet in his brother to prove it. This chapter ain't about brotherly love. It's about showing who you willing to kill for. Blood makes you related, loyalty makes you family. Time to see what Mateo made of. He gonna prove he down to ride? Or end up six feet deep for crossing Trigga Troy? The streets gonna find out real soon which choice this blood brother makes.
dont name it blood brother or loyalty

Okay, here's a revised badass chapter name without using "blood brother" or "loyalty":

Chapter 1: The Trigga's Code 

The rules of the streets don't mean shit to Trigga Troy. He got his own code for how this game is played. And rule number one is don't never cross him. Mateo about to learn what happens when you break the Trigga's code. His own flesh and blood gonna pay the price. Trigga Troy ain't swayed by family ties or brotherly bonds. He got ice cold trigger fingers ready to let the bullets fly if you betray him. Mateo better wise up quick where his loyalties lie. Cause Trigga Troy got no mercy for loose ends. The only blood getting spilled today is from those who play by their own rules. Mateo gotta decide if he's gonna abide by the Trigga's code. Otherwise he might catch a bullet too. The streets are Troy’s to command. Mateo just living in ‘em.
